title: The Vampire Diaries Mod
description: A feature-rich mod inspired by The Vampire Diaries universe, introducing a dynamic magic system, powerful witches, vampires, werewolves, and other supernatural beings.
body:
# The Vampire Diaries Universe Mod
a simple magic mod based on the vampire diaries extended universe.

# Description
This is a mod that focuses on added features and concepts from the vampire diaries, the originals and legacies into minecraft. This is a magic based mod centered around witches, with the inclusion of vampires, psychics, werewolves and other sub-creatures.

This mods progression is based mainly on find structures spread across the world. The progression items appear in the form of grimoires, diaries and bibles (Books in general). 

# Features
 

Magic system
Vampires
Witches
Werewolves
Psychics
Prison Worlds
Structures (Tombs, Crypts, Graves, Houses)
Custom Tress
Spells
Grimoires
Immortality


_**FOR VERSIONS BEFORE 1.20.1 BETA DECEMBER 24TH YOU NEED KLEIDERS CUSTOM RENDERER**
_
